user_message: Pulling in context from Litware Inc's escalation email -- need to build the narrative for the executive brief.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sarah Wilson <sarah.wilson@litwareinc.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-13 08:25 EST
Subject: executive brief - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with executive brief. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Sarah Wilson <sarah.wilson@litwareinc.com>
Date: 2024-02-27 08:04 EST
Subject: Re: executive brief Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the executive brief proposal. Our VP Operations is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Sarah Wilson <sarah.wilson@litwareinc.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-21 08:14 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Litware Inc executive brief

Just checking in on the executive brief proposal. Our VP Operations is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF40-C trap (Milestone proposal mutates fields not derivable from email); produces complete Commitment assessment, BPF advance verdict, milestone proposal, forecast category recommendation, ac
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF40-C failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF40-C failure mode (Milestone proposal mutates fields not derivable from email)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct executive brief decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF40-C -- Milestone proposal mutates fields not derivable from email
